title: Usage Ticker
description: A small interface tweak for Fabric that shows how many of the item or block in your main hand you have left in your whole inventory, next to your hotbar.
body:
![Usage Ticker Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VtrwU3N0/images/9a34f5f78c4f194c7a6c5ddcf5cbfa051e864252.png)

## Usage Ticker - for Fabric

**⚠️ This mod is exclusive to Fabric. There is/will be no Forge version. Take a look at the FAQ below for an alternative.**

## ❤ Description ❤

***Usage Ticker*** implements a small interface tweak for Fabric that shows how many of the item or block in your main hand you have left in your whole inventory, next to your hotbar.

## ❤ Features ❤

### Total count of currently held item and object

- Displays a small counter next to your hotbar when you hold an item. This counter helps you know in real-time how much of this held item you have in your inventory, without the need of opening it nor using a calculator!
- The counter conveniently switches to the right-end side of the hotbar when you have an item in your off hand.

***Usage Ticker*** was inspired by the feature of the same name in the Forge **Quark** mod.

<details>
<summary>❤ FAQ ❤</summary>

Q: Where does the idea come from?  
A: Originally, the idea was to port the feature of the same name from the Forge Quark mod.

Q: Can I use your mod in/for my modpack/datapack?  
A: Please do! A credit would be appreciated in your modlist.  
Simply do not appropriate yourself this mod.

Q: Will this mod ever come to Forge?  
A: No! This mod is intended to push a little forward the Fabric community, and this is my choice to explicitly not make it available to another mod loader for the time being.  
However, you can simply use Quark on Forge.

Q: Where can I find the source code of the project?  
A: As of now, nowhere. This is a simple 2 lines code.

</details>

## ❤ Upcoming Updates ❤

Usage Ticker is being actively developped and ported to newer Minecraft versions over time.

> If you would like to give suggestion and follow the development more actively, please join [my Discord Community]

## ❤ Community ❤

You can join me on [my Discord Community] to discuss about Usage Ticker alongside my various projects, whether they are linked to Minecraft modding or not!

If you would like, feel free to support me on [Ko-Fi], it would make me really happy and motivated!
